title: ACE Task Queue (docs/progress/tasks.json)
description: File-based task state machine mandated by the Harness Engineering Standard (.ace/standards/harness-engineering.md, section 2) and driven by the `ace loop` orchestrator. The queue is the single source of truth for work state across context-flushed agent sessions. Loop invariants not expressible in JSON Schema: (1) at most one task may have status 'in_progress' at any time; (2) a task is eligible for pickup only when every id in depends_on has status 'verified'; (3) 'attempts' never exceeds 'max_attempts' (task-level, else defaults.max_attempts) — when the budget is exhausted, or the same failure fingerprint occurs twice consecutively (stall detection), the orchestrator must transition the task to 'blocked' and halt for human escalation; (4) no task may depend on itself, directly or transitively.

version.description: Schema version of this file, independent of the framework version.

plan_ref.description: Relative path to the approved implementation plan this queue was generated from.

updated.description: Set by the orchestrator on every state transition.

defaults.description: Queue-wide defaults; individual tasks may override.

max_attempts.description: Retry budget per task before forced escalation to 'blocked'.

runner.description: Runner adapter used to spawn a fresh agent session per attempt. 'manual' prints the assembled prompt and waits for a human-driven session.

verify_cmd.description: Command that must exit 0 for a task to be marked 'verified'. Defaults to '.ace/scripts/verify.sh' when omitted.

id.description: Stable task identifier, unique within the queue. Also names the progress log: docs/progress/task_<id>_result.md.

objective.description: What is observably true when this task is done. Written for a Generator that has no conversation history.

status.description: pending: not started. in_progress: a Generator session owns it (max one queue-wide). verified: acceptance_cmd/verify_cmd exited 0 and result file written. failed: last attempt failed, retry budget remains. blocked: budget exhausted or stall detected — requires human action. skipped: descoped by the Architect (reason in notes).

role.description: Role prompt loaded into the fresh session for this task.

depends_on.description: Task ids that must be 'verified' before this task is eligible. Empty array means no dependencies.

acceptance_cmd.description: Task-specific verification command; overrides defaults.verify_cmd. Must exit 0.

attempts.description: Number of Generator sessions consumed by this task so far.

result_file.description: Progress log written by the Generator on completion; the memory handed to the next agent.

failures.description: One entry per failed attempt, consumed by the Reflector and by stall detection.

blocked_reason.description: Required when status is 'blocked'. Why the loop halted and what the human must decide.

summary.description: One-paragraph natural-language description of what failed, written by the orchestrator from the verify output.

fingerprint.description: Normalized identity of the failure (e.g., sha256 of the failing test names + first error line, lowercased, paths stripped). Two consecutive identical fingerprints on one task = stall; the orchestrator must transition the task to 'blocked' instead of retrying.

trace_ref.description: Path to the full execution/verify trace for the Reflector.
